title: Create x Valkyrien Skies Clockwork Survival support
description: Adds the missing recipes, to enable survival gameplay.
body:
The pack enables survival gameplay and adds the missing recipes for the Create+VS-Clockwork
although there is an official pack for this, i prefer my own recipes, so here they are :)

 
Mechanical Crafting:

-Gravitron
,Pastrymaker
,Physics Infuser


Crafting:

-Propellor, Phys and Flap bearing, Afterblazer 
,Intake
,Reaction Wheel
,Ballooner
,Redstone Infuser
,Command Seat
,Flaps, Wings
,Combustion Engine
,BluuGuu, Bluperglue
,Balloon Casing, Balloon Encased Shaft


Mixing:

-Vanilla Frosting
,Chocolate Frosting
,Strawberry Frosting

Item Application:

-Balloon Casing



Disclaimer:

This is an unofficial pack made for singleplayer use. I know there is an official one on the official Mod discord.

Pack created by Legende__
